title: Silicone Air Fryer Liner 2 Pack for 7.6L 8L 9L 9.5L Baskets, Reusable AirFryer Accessories Compatible with Ninja Dual AF300UK AF400UK/KCP AF451UK, Tower T1708, COSORI, Instant, Keplin
features: 【Reusable Silicone Air Fryer Liner】Suitable for Ninja dual air fryer AF300UK AF400UK/KCP AF451UK of ninja air fryer accessories, Also match Tower Dual T17088, Silicone Air Fryer Liner wall thickness has good support.

【Food Grade Silicone Material】With your health at the core of our solutions, we use food-grade silicone that is durable and emits no order. It also boasts a great thermal tolerance of up to 450°F, which leaves you relieved of all the concerns you have on the peculiar smell of the product and focused on creating culinary wonders.

【Custom Design for Perfect Compatibility】 The dimension of this product is 8.67x5.9X2.68inches, which is high enough to leave no space of the inside of the fryer wasted. The bottom of the liner comes with raised silicone strips, which separates food from oil produced during cooking and reduces your intake of fat. It also contributes to the air circulation within the liner which helps reduce cooking time and save up on utility bills.

【Easy to Clean】 Helps isolate your food from the fryer and saves you the trouble of having to clean the inside of it. As for the liner itself, the striped design at the bottom facilitates the cleaning whether you wanna hand-wash it or put it in the dishwasher. With this liner, dish-washing doesn't have to be a nuisance anyone.

【Wide Range of Uses】Apart from air fryers, this meticulously conceptualized liner is also suitable for use with baking ovens, microwave ovens, refrigerators, steamers, stoves and can also be used to serve dishes and fruits.
description: Product Description Suitable for Ninja Dual Zone Air Fryer [AF300UK] 2 drawers, 7.6L/ [AF400UK] 2 drawers, 9.5L, Tower [T17088] 2 drawers,9L Customized Silicone Air Feryer Liner is suitable for Ninja/Tower/Instant/Salter/MonCook/Emtronics Easy to clean, convenient for storage, save you precious time for you Widely used Ninja Air fryer accessories is suitable for oven, microwave oven, refrigerator, steamer, cooking utensils, stoves, vegetables, fruits, etc. MAIN FEATURES Easy to Clean Heat-Resistant (450° to -40° F) Soft Silicone Non-Stick and Odourless
